bird.name: Grey-naped antpitta
bird.summary: The grey-naped antpitta (Grallaria griseonucha) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Venezuela.

locations.name: 梅里达州
locations.summary: 梅里达州（西班牙語：Mérida），位于委内瑞拉西部，行政中心是梅里达市。面积11,300平方公里，人口843,800。

locations.name: 特鲁希略州
locations.summary: 特魯希略州（西班牙語：Estado Trujillo）是委內瑞拉西部的一個州，西北臨馬拉開波湖。面積7,400平方公里，2007年人口711,400人。首府特魯希略。 1899年建州。下分二十個自治市。

relations.subject: Grey-naped antpitta
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in south-central Mérida and eastern Trujillo states

relations.subject: Grey-naped antpitta
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in south-central Mérida and eastern Trujillo states

relations.subject: Grey-naped antpitta
relations.evidence: The species inhabits the floor and undergrowth of humid, mossy, montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
